## Summary

Describe the lab behavior or documentation this changes.

## Safety

- [ ] No live malware, real credentials, or third-party target data was added.
- [ ] Exploit examples remain scoped to an owned-device or emulator lab.
- [ ] Documentation was updated if behavior changed.

## Validation

- [ ] Repository tests pass with `python -m pytest -q`.
- [ ] Android build or emulator validation notes are included when relevant.

## Notes

Mention Android version impact, OWASP/MASVS mapping impact, or release impact.
